likelihoodScale.label: Rare
likelihoodScale.definition: Not expected to occur; less than 10% likelihood.

likelihoodScale.label: Unlikely
likelihoodScale.definition: Could occur, but not expected; 10–30% likelihood.

likelihoodScale.label: Likely
likelihoodScale.definition: Expected unless action is taken; 61–80% likelihood.

likelihoodScale.label: Almost Certain
likelihoodScale.definition: Expected or already trending toward occurrence; greater than 80% likelihood.

impactScale.label: Insignificant
impactScale.definition: Minimal impact; absorbed within normal project management.

impactScale.label: Minor
impactScale.definition: Localized impact; manageable without milestone, budget, safety, quality, or client exposure.

impactScale.label: Moderate
impactScale.definition: Meaningful project impact; may affect float, rework, cost, client confidence, or coordination.

impactScale.label: Major
impactScale.definition: Significant exposure; may affect milestone, cost, safety, quality, compliance, or owner commitments.

impactScale.label: Severe
impactScale.definition: Critical exposure; may affect contractual milestone, life safety, regulatory compliance, major cost, or executive/client relationship.

scoreBands.requiredPosture: Owner, mitigation, due date, review cadence, and PX visibility required.
Immediate escalation, PX review, executive visibility, response plan, and Priority Action candidate required.

severityOverrides.condition: linked contractual milestone at risk and likelihood >= 3
residual risk remains High or Critical after mitigation

reviewCadenceRules.cadence: Weekly minimum; immediate escalation until response accepted
